note: Added `Warnings []string` (omitempty) to `contractReviewResponse`. Changed `blocks, _ := parseReviewerFindingBlocks(...)` to collect parse warnings (including the 'parse miss' sentinel). Also collect warnings when `json.Unmarshal` fails on an individual finding. Warnings are included in the JSON response and printed in `writeContractReviewOutput`. (contract_review.go lines 237-280, ~655)

`writeContractAcceptDraft` now iterates `response.Next` instead of hardcoding `pactum contract approve`. The `ContractAcceptDraft` caller already populates `response.Next` via `nextCommandsForRun`, which returns `pactum contract review` when reviewers are configured. (contract_draft.go:720)

Added `TestValidateContractReviewers` to config_test.go covering: registered names pass, empty allowed, unregistered name rejected, duplicate rejected, blank rejected — mirroring TestValidateReviewPanel.

Added `TestContractReviewMultipleReviewers` to contract_review_test.go. Configures two reviewers (helper-a, helper-b), runs `contract review --json`, and asserts both appear in `response.Reviewers`, each produces one finding per lens, and each finding names its reviewer. (contract_review_test.go)

Added `TestContractReviewHumanReadableFindings` to contract_review_test.go. Runs `contract review` (without --json), and asserts findings count, reviewer name, finding message text, and Next section all appear in the human-readable stdout. (contract_review_test.go)

Changed `contractReviewersConfigured` signature from `bool` to `(bool, error)`. In `nextCommandsForRun`, a config read error now routes to `pactum contract review` (not approve), so a broken `contract.reviewers` entry surfaces rather than being silently bypassed. Added `readConfig` call at the top of `ContractApprove` so approval fails immediately on invalid config (e.g. unregistered contract.reviewers entry). (resolve.go:303, contract.go:291)

Added `pactum contract review` (with `when contract.reviewers is configured` annotation) to the agent-launching commands list. Updated the read-only stages sentence to include `contract review`. (SECURITY.md:11)
